text: Replaced the Typewriter component with a decode-style TextScramble. Characters resolve left to right through random chars. Feels like the terminal is thinking, not just typing.
The scramble-on-generate effect solved the dead zone between prompt submit and API response. Without it, the hero text just sat there for 2 seconds looking broken.
Moved briefing cache from in-memory Map to Redis. The Map worked fine in dev but serverless functions don't share memory across invocations. Every cold start was a cache miss.
Scrapped the trailing cursor shadow. Looked clever in isolation but felt like lag in practice. Subtlety beats gimmick every time.
